task_objective: Fix flat histograms in report screenshots and improve documentation visuals.
design_decisions: Implemented numeric rounding (to 2 decimal places) in QueryPlanner before value_counts to aggregate continuous data into meaningful bins for the top-value distribution plot.
Improved robustness of Report model to dynamically identify count columns in Ibis aggregation results, handling varying auto-generated column names.
Created a specialized demo dataset with normal, skewed, and missing patterns to produce professional-grade documentation screenshots.
Ordered demo data columns to ensure the most visually interesting histograms appear at the top of the report.
results: Histograms in the report now correctly show statistical distributions instead of appearing flat. Documentation screenshots are high-fidelity and accurately represent the profiler's capabilities.
